description:
Hi MediTrack support,

When I try to generate a PT progress-note from the SOAP template, the note saves blank and the objective measurements section doesn't carry over from the last visit. This started after the last update.

Can you take a look?

Thanks,
Shannon Perry, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: PT progress-note template saving blank

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

Our scheduling module isn't syncing with the front-desk calendar. Appointments booked in the patient portal aren't appearing on the clinician day-sheet until hours later.

What should we check?

Thanks,
Monica Vance, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Scheduling module not syncing to day-sheet

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

I need to export a patient chart to PDF for a referral back to Southern Orthopedics, but the export button spins and never produces a file. Tried two different charts with the same result.

Thanks,
Shannon Perry, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Chart PDF export failing to generate

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

The billing module is rejecting CPT code 97110 on PT claims with a validation error, even though it was accepted last month. This is holding up our claim submissions.

Thanks,
Dr. Anita Lawson, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Billing module rejecting CPT 97110

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

Can we add a custom field to the intake template to capture a patient's primary sport and position? We see a lot of athletes and it would help triage. How do we configure that?

Thanks,
Shannon Perry, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Adding a custom intake field for sport/position

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

Monica can't print the daily visit-summary handouts. The print preview loads but nothing comes out of the front-desk printer, and other apps print fine.

Thanks,
Monica Vance, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Visit-summary handouts will not print

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

A patient statement double-posted a $40 copay in the ledger and now the account balance is wrong. How do I reverse the duplicate posting without affecting the original charge?

Thanks,
Dr. Anita Lawson, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Duplicate copay posting in patient ledger

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

The EMR is timing out on our treatment-room workstations during the evening. We get logged out mid-note and lose work. It's worst between 5 and 7 pm when several clinicians are charting at once.

Thanks,
Shannon Perry, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: EMR timing out and logging clinicians out mid-note

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

A scanned MRI report uploaded to the patient document section is showing as corrupted and won't open. The file was a 6 MB PDF. Can it be recovered or should we re-scan?

Thanks,
Monica Vance, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Uploaded document showing as corrupted

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

Three claims submitted last week came back rejected with a payer ID mismatch for Blue Cross of Alabama. The claims look correct on our end. Can you check the clearinghouse mapping?

Thanks,
Dr. Anita Lawson, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Claims rejected with payer ID mismatch

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

We'd like to add Shannon as a provider with e-prescribe disabled but full charting access. The new-user setup wizard keeps requiring an NPI before it will save the role. How do we proceed?

Thanks,
Monica Vance, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: New provider setup blocked by NPI requirement

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

The outcome-measure questionnaire (LEFS) we use for knee patients isn't totaling the score automatically anymore. We have to add it by hand. Can you fix the scoring rule?

Thanks,
Shannon Perry, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Outcome-measure questionnaire not auto-scoring

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

Appointment reminder texts to patients stopped going out two days ago. Patients are no-showing because they aren't getting the 24-hour reminder. Is the SMS service down on your end?

Thanks,
Monica Vance, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Patient appointment reminder texts not sending

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

After the latest release, the mobile app on Dr. Lawson's tablet won't sync charts and shows a sync error after the update. Desktop is fine. Tried reinstalling with no luck.

Thanks,
Monica Vance, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Mobile app sync error after update

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

The end-of-day visit report doesn't match the number of completed appointments on the schedule. Two checked-in visits are missing from the report. Can you look into the report logic?

Thanks,
Shannon Perry, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: End-of-day visit report missing appointments

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

We'd like to build a reusable exercise-flowsheet template for our common ACL rehab protocol so we stop rebuilding it per patient. Can you walk us through creating a custom flowsheet?

Thanks,
Shannon Perry, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Help building a custom exercise flowsheet template

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

A patient's name is misspelled in their chart header and it's now on their statements. How do I correct the demographic record so it updates everywhere, including past documents?

Thanks,
Monica Vance, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Correcting a misspelled patient name in chart

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

Our monthly A/R aging report isn't emailing to the billing inbox on schedule. We haven't received it for two months and have to run it manually. Can you check the scheduled-report delivery?

Thanks,
Dr. Anita Lawson, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Scheduled A/R aging report not emailing

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

SSO login through our identity provider keeps failing for two clinicians this morning, while others get in fine. They get an authentication error after entering credentials. Can you check the SSO config?

Thanks,
Shannon Perry, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: SSO login failing for some clinicians

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

The patient-portal messages from patients aren't reaching our front-desk inbox. Patients say they replied to appointment requests but Monica never sees them. Where are they routing?

Thanks,
Shannon Perry, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Patient-portal messages not reaching front desk

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

The discount/adjustment code we use for our cash-pay athlete package isn't applying at checkout in the billing module. It says the code is invalid. It worked last quarter.

Thanks,
Dr. Anita Lawson, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Cash-pay adjustment code not applying

description:
Hi MediTrack support,

Our monthly subscription invoice jumped by $30 with no plan change we're aware of. Can you break down what changed on our practice license?

Thanks,
Dr. Anita Lawson, Iron City Sports Medicine
subject: Unexpected increase on subscription invoice
